summary.shape_sentence: Bullish reclaim/trend day: early chop and dip, noon reclaim, 14:00 breakout drive, late pullback into a still-bullish close.

goat.note: Strong upside breakout from the 29480 area through 29550, producing the standout move of the day.

red_circles.behavior: Bearish pivots appeared around the 29500-29530 supply shelf and marked pullbacks rather than full reversal.

green_circles.behavior: Bullish pivots appeared on the 14:00 breakout and later reclaim attempts near 29490-29505.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply around 29500-29506 was broken during the GOAT drive, then retested and contested late.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand around 29455-29475 held into the close after the late-session pullback.

time_markers.10am_blue: Early RTH remained unstable and rotational near the lower/mid range.
time_markers.12pm_red: Noon acted as the key reclaim point after the morning dip.
time_markers.2pm_green: Clean bullish trigger and launch into the strongest upside drive.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Closed green at roughly 29475.50, off the high but above afternoon demand.

tags.banks_broken: supply around 29500-29506 broken during goat drive

takeaway: Bullish reclaim day with a decisive 14:00 breakout drive, followed by a late pullback that held afternoon demand. Best comparable: rotational morning into afternoon trend expansion, not an all-day one-way trend.
